checks.name: topology commands
checks.detail: start with: pnpm services:up | pnpm dev | pnpm --filter @cowards/worker dev | cd apps/go-backend && COWARDS_GO_BACKEND_OWNER_TOKENS=<secret>=user:local go run . | pnpm sandbox:evaluate:container | pnpm topology:check -- --web-url http://localhost:3000/ --go-url http://127.0.0.1:8087/ | COWARDS_GO_PUBLIC_STRATEGY_READS=1 COWARDS_GO_BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8087/ pnpm --filter @cowards/web dev | pnpm topology:check -- --require-web-go-public-strategy-read --web-url http://localhost:3000/
